text: Build a clean, reusable SINGLE-FILE HTML micro-site template for a generic ONE TEN LAB client (a local small business). Save as tasks/T-027/template/index.html. Requirements: modern premium dark styling matching ONE TEN's gold-on-charcoal look (gold #d8b46d on charcoal #171614, Inter/system font); responsive; sections = hero, about, menu/services, gallery (3 placeholders), contact; use obvious placeholder tokens like {{BRAND}}, {{TAGLINE}}, {{ABOUT}}, {{CTA_EMAIL}} so it can be auto-filled per client; no external JS/CSS dependencies (all inline). Also add a short tasks/T-027/README.md explaining the tokens. IMPORTANT: git add, commit as [Mini], and PUSH to origin (retry with git pull --rebase if rejected). Then warroom-say one line.
